sections.title: Terms and Conditions
content: These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of Dyson Tech's website and services.
By accessing this website, you agree to accept these terms and conditions. Do not continue to use Dyson Tech if you do not agree to all of the terms and conditions stated on this page.

The following terminology applies to these Terms and Conditions, Privacy Statement, and Disclaimer Notice: 'Client', 'You', and 'Your' refers to you, the person accessing this website. 'The Company', 'Ourselves', 'We', 'Our', and 'Us', refers to Dyson Tech.

sections.title: Cookies
content: We employ the use of cookies. By accessing Dyson Tech, you agree to use cookies in agreement with our Privacy Policy.
Cookies are used to enable the functionality of certain areas and to make it easier for people visiting our website. Some of our partners may also use cookies.

sections.title: What Are Cookies
content: Cookies are small files downloaded to your computer to improve your experience. This page describes what information they gather, how we use it, and why we sometimes need to store these cookies. You can prevent these cookies from being stored, but this may downgrade or break certain elements of the site's functionality.

sections.title: How We Use Cookies
content: We use cookies for a variety of reasons detailed in this policy. Unfortunately, in most cases, there are no industry standard options for disabling cookies without completely disabling the functionality and features they add to this site. It is recommended that you leave on all cookies if you are not sure whether you need them or not.

sections.title: License
content: Unless otherwise stated, Dyson Tech and/or its licensors own the intellectual property rights for all material on this website.
All intellectual property rights are reserved. You may access this from Dyson Tech for your own personal use subjected to restrictions set in these terms and conditions.

You must not: republish material from Dyson Tech, sell, rent or sub-license material from Dyson Tech, reproduce, duplicate or copy material from Dyson Tech, or redistribute content from Dyson Tech unless content is specifically made for redistribution.
